# mango.career

> mango.career is an agent-operated job-application pipeline with a public board: a React shell deployed with zero bytes of application data, reading and writing a private single-source-of-truth repository through the GitHub Contents API. Humans edit through the board UI with a fine-grained PAT; agents commit to git directly under the same schema; a Gmail scan feeds receipt confirmations and rejections back as status-transition commits. The audit trail is the git history itself.

The application data (companies, statuses, documents) lives in a private repository and is not published here. This index covers the public shell only.

## Start here

- [Board](https://mangowhoiscloud.github.io/career/): the deployed shell. Renders nothing without a token; with one, a status ledger, Sankey funnel, and submission timeline
- [Source](https://github.com/mangowhoiscloud/career): Vite + React 19 + TypeScript, GitHub Actions to Pages
- [README](https://github.com/mangowhoiscloud/career/blob/main/README.md): why the shell and the data are split, and what the board refuses to log outside git
- [DESIGN.md](https://github.com/mangowhoiscloud/career/blob/main/DESIGN.md): amber terminal-ledger design system. IBM Plex, one signal color, closed 10-word status vocabulary, rejected rows at full opacity

## How it works

- [App](https://github.com/mangowhoiscloud/career/blob/main/src/App.tsx): the whole UI in one file: optimistic status updates with a 409 refetch-and-retry, automatic date stamp on submission, screening-hop insertion when a status jumps past document screening, stage-reached filtering
- [Types](https://github.com/mangowhoiscloud/career/blob/main/src/types.ts): the application schema and the closed status vocabulary the board and the agents share
- [API](https://github.com/mangowhoiscloud/career/blob/main/src/api.ts): GitHub Contents API reads and commits; document blobs open from the private repo through authenticated fetch

## Related

- [GEODE llms.txt](https://mangowhoiscloud.github.io/geode/llms.txt): the autonomous agent that operates this pipeline, with its own published index
- [GEODE docs](https://mangowhoiscloud.github.io/geode/docs): the agent's documentation root
